findings.description: The POST /agents/{agent_id}/kick endpoint (coordination_api.py:2905-2947) depends on skills/worktree/scripts/worktree.py, but the skills/ directory is not copied into the agent-coordinator Docker image. This endpoint will fail with a FileNotFoundError in Docker/Cloud environments (e.g., Railway). The Dockerfile should be updated to include necessary skill scripts or the logic should be moved into the coordinator package.

Token-in-URL hardening required by design D2 and tasks 2.7b/2.12 is incomplete. GET /events/work (coordination_api.py:2711-2746) passes the JWT as a query parameter but lacks access-log redaction, meaning Uvicorn will log sensitive tokens. Additionally, the SSE response lacks 'Referrer-Policy: no-referrer' and 'Cache-Control: no-store' headers required to prevent token leakage via Referer headers or intermediate caches.

The file-write helpers write_saved_view and write_audit_event (kanban_viz_files.py:77-151) stamp headers but fail to validate the payload against the JSON schemas defined in contracts/schemas/. This allows malformed UI state to be persisted to the repository, violating the contract-first design. jsonschema.validate() should be added to these helpers.

Several features marked as complete in tasks.md are not wired into the UI. App.tsx and its subcomponents lack the Saved-view UI surface, drag-to-Ready handlers (PATCH /issues/{id}/labels), and the force-release-lock action (DELETE /locks/{file_path}). Library functions (saveView.ts) and backend endpoints exist, but the user cannot access them from the board.

Duplicate/dead test file: skills/tests/agent-coordinator/test_kanban_viz_endpoints.py. This file is a smaller, stale version of agent-coordinator/tests/test_kanban_viz_endpoints.py and is not included in the standard pytest path. It should be removed to avoid confusion.
